subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Him Who hath been wronged unto him who hath turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon and hath believed in God, the Lord of the Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذی اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و آمن بالله مالک یوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for protection, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment
